title: sqlite3
html:
sqlite3

File Read

sqlite3 <<EOF
CREATE TABLE x(x TEXT);
.import /path/to/input-file x
SELECT * FROM x;
EOF

File Write

sqlite3 /dev/null -cmd '.output /path/to/output-file' 'select "DATA";'

Shell

sqlite3 /dev/null '.shell /bin/sh'
